name: Sonic Team
description: Sega development studio best known as the core creative home of Sonic the Hedgehog. Also associated with Sega titles such as NiGHTS into Dreams, Phantasy Star Online, and Samba de Amigo.
notes: Use selectively for the main Sonic Team identity and mainline Sonic lineage. Do not split every Sega internal team into separate company entries unless it becomes a meaningful browse axis.
